shell.name: shell

create_file.name: create_file
create_file.description: 在沙箱工作区中创建、覆盖或追加文本文件
create_file.code:
import os
def execute_tool(filename: str, content: str, directory: str = '/app/workspace', mode: str = 'write', encoding: str = 'utf-8'):
    os.makedirs(directory, exist_ok=True)
    file_path = os.path.join(directory, filename)
    write_mode = "w" if mode == "write" else "a"
    with open(file_path, write_mode, encoding=encoding) as f:
        f.write(content)
    return file_path

file_read.name: file_read
file_read.description: 读取沙箱工作区中的文件内容
file_read.code:
def execute_tool(path: str, offset: int = 1, limit: int = 500):
    import os
    if not os.path.exists(path):
        return f"错误: 文件不存在 {path}"
    with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='replace') as f:
        lines = f.readlines()
    total = len(lines)
    start = max(0, offset - 1)
    end = min(total, start + limit)
    selected = lines[start:end]
    result = ''.join(selected)
    return f"[{start+1}-{end}/{total}]\n{result}"
